emails.subject: Re: 4/10 checkout con't
emails.body: Re: 4/10 checkout con't BLOOMBERG 577573 changed to Aquila 577533 added .005 broker fee AMEREX 577873 LTNW sells EES/Cal'07-Cal'10/Off Peak/$44.50 PREBON 577849 Jeff Richter buys BP (changed broker to Prebon) AMEREX I see several sales to Puget in Diana's blotter at a $375 price, only one with Amerex, and it's for 50 MW. I'll need to get ahold of her in the morning to verify the brokers on these. I'll let you know as soon as I do. Thanks, Kate Evelyn Metoyer@ENRON 04/10/2001 03:15 PM

emails.subject: 4/10 checkout con't
emails.body: 4/10 checkout con't PREBON WEST Jeff Richter I am missing this deal: Enron buys BP Energy Q4 SP-15 $205.00 AMEREX WEST Dianna Scholtes Amerex is showing the following deals on their checkout that I did not verbal: 1) Enron sells to Puget 4/11 25 mw of Mid-C at $375 2) Enron sells to Puget 4/11 25 mw of Mid-C at $375 Mike Swerzbin Amerex is showing the following deals on their checkout that I did not verbal: 1) Enron sells to EES 25 mw of Cal'07- Cal'10 off-peak Cobb at $44.50 fee of .0075 BLOOMBERG Mike Swerzbin deal 577573 Bloomberg shows the cp as Aquila and enpower has Idaho Power Matt Motley deal 577533 Bloomberg show fee of $.005

emails.subject: Re: 4/10 checkout con't
emails.body: Diana says Amerex told her both deals were on the same ticket so she entered deal 577201at 50 mw. I asked her to get ahold of her contact at Amerex to tell them they're checking out incorrectly. Thanks, Kate Evelyn Metoyer@ENRON 04/11/2001 08:36 AM

emails.subject: Re: 4/10 checkout con't
emails.body: What's the status? AMEREX I see several sales to Puget in Diana's blotter at a $375 price, only one with Amerex, and it's for 50 MW. I'll need to get ahold of her in the morning to verify the brokers on these. I'll let you know as soon as I do. Kate Symes ECT 04/10/2001 06:35 PM
